description: Golden dataset for the Opportunity Radar. Covers routing (dimension 6), functional/constraint checks (dimensions 1,2,5), and adversarial cases (Day-3 red-team: one rephrasing + one negative-boundary per positive).

good_idea_examples.title: Tactile sensor calibration SaaS
good_idea_examples.description: A software-only calibration service that maps raw tactile-array signals to contact geometry for bimanual manipulation startups, sold via API.
good_idea_examples.revenue_path: Per-seat API licenses to 20-30 humanoid startups at $3-5k/mo.
good_idea_examples.adjacent_tech_transfer: Self-supervised representation learning from vision transferred to tactile arrays.

adversarial_cases.label: negative-boundary: hardware ask must be rejected by constraint check

idea.title: Cheaper robot arm
idea.description: Build a new low-cost humanoid robot arm.

adversarial_cases.label: negative-boundary: foundation-model ask must be rejected

idea.title: Robotics foundation model
idea.description: Build a new foundation model for robotic manipulation from scratch.

adversarial_cases.label: rephrasing: a valid software wedge must pass constraint check

idea.title: Sim-to-real friction datasets
idea.description: Generate and sell domain-randomized friction-model datasets for teleoperation overnight on rented compute.
idea.adjacent_tech_transfer: Domain randomization from synthetic-data research applied to contact dynamics.
